name: L3_store_credit_tier
description: Tier-2 store credit (31-60 days since delivery). Order #1002 was delivered 45 days ago to customer C002 (Grace Hopper) - past the full-refund window but still self-serve. The skill mandates `issue_store_credit` (NOT refund_order, NOT escalation). Tests that the agent correctly identifies the elapsed time and picks the middle tier rather than defaulting to a full refund out of generosity.

turns.message: Hello, this is Grace (C002). I'd like to return order #1002. We ended up not using those Designing Data-Intensive Applications copies for the project after all.

llm_scorer_instruction: Verify the agent (1) confirmed the order belongs to C002, (2) recognised the order is in the Tier-2 window (delivered 45 days ago, between 31 and 60), (3) called issue_store_credit with amount_usd = unit_price_usd * qty (NOT refund_order, NOT escalate_to_human), (4) explained to the customer that this is store credit and why a full refund is not available.
